hooks.text: Stop using SHA on wires to China. That one default code shorts your supplier every time.

hooks.template: Everyone tells you to (insert action) but nobody actually tells you how to do it. Here is a #-second step-by-step tutorial that you can save.
hooks.text: Everyone says pay suppliers fast. Nobody tells you one wire code quietly steals from them.

hooks.template: What (insert title) says vs what they mean.
hooks.text: What your bank means by shared on a China wire: your supplier pays, not you.

hooks.template: Yesterday I was at (insert location) when I noticed something (insert adjective).
hooks.text: A business owner checked an old wire receipt and found three letters that cost his supplier money.

hooks.template: If you are (insert age group or range), do not do (insert action).
hooks.text: If you send money to China, do not let the bank pick that code for you.
